name: Agify_predict_age
description: Predict the age of a person based on their first name using the Agify.io API. Returns the predicted age and sample count used for the prediction. Optionally filter by country for more accurate results. Supports 249 countries. Based on statistical analysis of hundreds of millions of data points. Useful for demographic analysis, name-based profiling research, and sociolinguistic studies. Free, no API key required (1000 requests/day).

name.description: First name to predict age for (e.g., 'michael', 'maria', 'yuki', 'mohammed', 'priya')

country_id.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for country-specific prediction (e.g., 'US', 'GB', 'JP', 'BR', 'IN', 'DE'). Improves accuracy by limiting to that country's name distribution.

count.description: Number of data points used for prediction

country_id.description: Country code used for filtering (if provided)
